system.description:
Particularly cruel or deadly weapons sometimes include things like living barbs or shards that remain in their victims' wounds causing them immense pain and even slowly killing them. When a target suffers at least one wound from this weapon they count as being 'crippled' for the remainder of the encounter or until healed of all Damage.

If a crippled character takes more than a Half Action on their turn, they suffer Rending Damage equal to the number in parenthesis (X). This Damage is not reduced by armour or Toughness.
